title: General Counsel
summary: The General Counsel protects Neuroartan’s legal foundation, public claims, contracts, rights, and governance movement.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role protects contracts, rights, governance movement, regulatory posture, disclosure discipline, and the legal structure around ICOS.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Keep Neuroartan legally clear, protected, and ready to move with confidence as the company, product, and public presence grow.
